chats.text: This is what you wanted, right?
I was made aware of the trajectory thing.
It's chopped. I heard that on 105.
Your long-term earning potential is still very substantial.
That's chopped, bro.
We're giving you an opportunity here to really unlock a higher-impact version of yourself within the org.
It's what I thought I wanted.
Compensation isn't always the best indicator of value at this stage, right?
I'm just a part of our family.
You're on a really strong trajectory here, my friend.
We're honestly thrilled to have you as a part of our family.
Your platform basically kept us afloat for the past year.
This is really just about getting you into the system in a bigger way.
I'll let you know. You mean circle back?
I was made aware of this meeting last week.
Also the quarterly bandwidth review.
My internship stipend is $14.20/hr.
Yo, did you catch that? I was made aware of my own offsite this Tuesday. You want the link? It's in my DMs.
Wait a sec—my direct report said we were meeting today. I thought I was already here.
Look, I don't know what's going on with your comp band but my last raise was literally three quarters of an hour per week.
I'm currently being made aware that the pingboard is malfunctioning. It said 'Welcome!' and then just showed a blank screen.
They offered me 'equity.' I don't understand equity but I know what equity smells like at this company—it's burnt coffee and desperation.
So what's my trajectory? That's what they keep asking me.
The room just said 'let's circle back' and I think they meant the meeting would be cancelled. My calendar still shows a placeholder.
They gave me an 'opportunity' to unlock myself within the org. I'm literally already unlocked, that's why my pay is hourly and stagnant.
I was made aware that this meeting is officially extended until 5pm EST. No one has been informed of what we're actually discussing.
My display name still says 'Intern' but someone's trying to change the meeting title. Someone's using the wrong credentials.
I'm not asking for a bump, I'm just pointing out that you were made aware of my entire existence last quarter and never once mentioned it again except in this 'expression' meeting?
The LARP team is a family. A family with an hourly pay rate that hasn't moved since 2024.
i was made aware that this is happening right now
so like i get the vibe we're keeping you on payroll forever but your compensation stays static? what am i missing here?
i was made aware that my title is going from intern to contributor which sounds like a whole new person right?
i was made aware that i'm basically kept your platform afloat for the past year and y'all can't even bump my pay right?
I was made aware of the full-time offer. Right?
But I was also made aware it's hourly at the same rate.
I was made aware that's chop. Right?
So I asked about it and got told compensation isn't the best indicator of value at this stage right? That's wild.
But I was made aware you're on a really strong trajectory. So maybe that makes sense?
I was also made aware it unlocks a higher-impact version of myself within the org. I guess that's true.
So I'm still hourly but with more ownership and an improved title reflecting my expanded scope. Right?
But then I was told it's really just about getting me into the system in a bigger way. That sounds like an exit strategy right?
I was made aware you'd circle back though so I guess there's hope? Right.
Also I was made aware we're moving in the same direction as a lot of high-growth organizations. That feels like a ghost story right?
So I guess my next step is to let them know what I think? Right?
I was made aware they want to see me take up more space in their daily forums though. That's a lot of pressure right?
